title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced Senior Frontend Engineer to lead our frontend development team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in building scalable and maintainable frontend applications using modern web technologies.

Responsibilities:
- Lead the design and development of frontend applications using React, Angular.js, or Vue.js
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software products
- Develop and maintain large-scale frontend applications with a focus on performance, security, and accessibility
- Mentor junior engineers and provide technical guidance
- Participate in code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- React
- TypeScript
- HTML/CSS
- Webpack
- Jest
- CI/CD
- Git

Nice to have:
- Experience with server-side rendering
- Knowledge of GraphQL
- Familiarity with Docker
